description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the gnar/base:1.0 Docker image and defines the PYTHONPATH variable as /builds/gnaar. Define a single stage named test. Add a test job in the test stage that runs pip3 install --upgrade pip setuptools codecov, then pip3 install -r app/requirements.txt, then pip3 install -r test/requirements.txt, then executes pytest, and finally uploads coverage with codecov --token=d9c2a4a7-e06f-4634-b2ae-fafc20ca92d2. The job runs on all branches with no caches, artifacts, or special rules.
